title: schoenia filifolia subsp. subulifolia
intro: Schoenia filifolia subsp. subulifolia, also known as woolly everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of woolly everlasting include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for skin conditions and digestive issues.
